text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a branch of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and work with human language. One major task is text understanding, where machines read and interpret written content, such as summarizing a long article. Another important use is translation, allowing people to convert text between languages automatically. Sentiment analysis is also common; it identifies whether a piece of writing expresses positive, negative, or neutral feelings, which businesses use to gauge customer opinions. Finally, chatbots use NLP to hold conversations, answering questions or providing customer service. These technologies have made digital communication much more efficient and accessible.
